final:
// // This module translates a public IP address back to a private IP address
module nat_translation(
    input wire clk,
    input wire [31:0] private_ip,
    input wire [31:0] nat_rule,
    output reg [31:0] public_ip
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        public_ip <= nat_rule; // Translate private IP to public IP using the NAT rule
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module translates a public IP address back to a private IP address
